title: Implement transcript_2, transcript_3, transcript_4 helpers matching python edhoc.py and RFC 9528
description: Define compute_th-based functions that produce identical output to Python _compute_th(th_input) using proper CBOR encoding for TH_2 = H(G_Y || H(msg1)), TH_3 = H(CBOR(TH_2) || CBOR(CIPHERTEXT_2) || CBOR(ID_CRED_R)), TH_4 = H(CBOR(TH_3) || CBOR(CIPHERTEXT_3)). Use test vectors from test/vectors/. --parent=project-LICHEN-y80q
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks c0rb.1-4 for transcript helpers. Epic complete.
